price: Da ging darin Verheerendes von deinem Herrn umher, während sie schliefen,
arabic: فَطَافَ عَلَيۡهَا طَآئِفٞ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمۡ نَآئِمُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: faṭāfa ʿalayhā ṭāifun min rabbika wahum nāimūna
